Bandit.special: Cowardly – when outnumbered or after taking Harm, test Spirit (DV 3) or flee.

Guard.special: Patrol Training – +1 die to Notice when searching an area.

Knight.special: Challenge – once/scene, force an enemy to engage in melee (Resist with Spirit, DV 4). Mounted.

Cultist.special: Ritual Chant – when three or more act together, they may perform a Low Rite as a group action.

Bandit Leader.special: Rally – once/scene, restore 1 Morale to a nearby bandit. Dirty Fighting – may spend 1 Boon to impose –1 die on target's next defense.

Lesser Spirit.special: Incorporeal Movement – passes through small gaps. Sunlight Sensitivity – while in direct sunlight, –1 die to all actions.

Greater Spirit.special: Elemental Aura – creatures in Close suffer 1 Fatigue per round. Immutable – immune to poison and disease.

Wraith.special: Life Drain – on a successful touch attack, target marks 1 Fatigue and wraith clears 1 Fatigue.

Wolf.special: Pack Tactics – when two or more wolves attack the same target, each gains +1 die. Blood Scent – +2 dice to track wounded prey.

Dire Bear.special: Terrifying Roar – all in Near test Resolve (DV 4) or become Shaken. Maul – on a Critical Hit, target is knocked prone and suffers +1 Harm.
